filePurposes.runtime.js: Webpack 5 runtime bootstrap: provides __webpack_require__ (module loader), __webpack_register__ (module registration), __webpack_chunk_load__ (JSONP chunk loader), __webpack_get_module__ (cross-chunk module access), and shared module cache __webpack_require__c. Infrastructure only — no business logic.
filePurposes.vendors.js: Shared utility chunk with 6 modules. Module 0=EventEmitter (on/off/emit/once — foundation of event-driven architecture), 1=tiny-md5 (checksum and dedup), 2=validator (isObject/isArray/deepEqual), 3=base64-codec, 4=debounce-throttle, 5=cookie-helper (get/set/del, SameSite=Lax).
filePurposes.app.js: Tracker chunk with 9 modules. Module 10=init (ENTRY — creates __TRACKER_EVENT_BUS__ EventEmitter, sets __TRACKER_CONFIG__), 11=page-view (url/referrer/title, SPA pushState hook, visibilitychange), 12=click-heatmap (xpath, offsetX/Y, throttle 500ms), 13=scroll-depth (25/50/75/100%, throttle 200ms), 14=form-watcher (focus timing, abandonment), 15=cart-tracker (add/remove, state snapshot), 16=session-manager (sessionId, heartbeat 30s, idle tracking), 17=error-catcher (window.onerror + unhandledrejection), 18=user-identity (cookie: uid_, first visit, 365-day expiry).
filePurposes.analytics.js: Processing pipeline with 5 modules. Module 20=event-aggregator (extends EventEmitter, dedup by type+ts, max 100 cache, auto-flush at 10), 21=sampling-engine (10% hash-based, whitelist/blacklist), 22=batch-builder (up to 50/batch, MD5 batch ID, auto-flush 5s, feeds __BATCH_QUEUE__), 23=dimension-builder (uid/sid/page/device/ts/event_type), 24=throttle-controller (token bucket: 30 max, 3/sec refill).
filePurposes.sender.js: Network transport with 4 modules. Module 30=transport-xhr (XHR POST, 10s timeout), 31=transport-beacon (sendBeacon, unload fallback), 32=retry-queue (exponential backoff 1→2→4→8→16s, max 5 retries, __RETRY_QUEUE__), 33=payload-builder (base64 payload, MD5 checksum, HMAC sign with key=tracker_prod_2025_v2).

dataFlow: USER INTERACTION → app tracker modules (11-18) emit events via __TRACKER_EVENT_BUS__.emit() → analytics module 20 (aggregator) deduplicates/caches events → module 21 (sampling) filters at 10% hash-based → module 22 (batch-builder) packs up to 50 events with MD5 batch ID → pushes to __BATCH_QUEUE__ (auto-flush 5s) → module 24 (throttle-controller) token-bucket rate-limits to 3/sec → sender module 33 (payload-builder) builds final payload, base64-encodes, MD5 checksums, HMAC signs (key: tracker_prod_2025_v2) → module 32 (retry-queue) enqueues → module 30 (transport-xhr) POST https://track.example.com/api/v3/batch (10s timeout) → on failure/unload: module 31 (transport-beacon) fallback

endpoints.purpose: Submit batched behavioral tracking events with HMAC signature
